subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The whole world cannot be equated with a single drop of blood that is shed in the path of God, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی جمیع عالم معادله نمینماید بیک قطره خونیکه در سبیل حق جل جلاله ریخته
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
